items.name: Superstar Tie
items.description: Show the world what you already know - you're a superstar!

items.name: Kunai Necklace of Endless Darkness
items.description: Deadly yet fashionable. A ninja is always prepared to strike, but also look amazing at the same time.

items.name: Bone Chilling Necklace
items.description: Don't worry....they're not real... I hope....

items.name: Omega Rainbow Bow Tie
items.description: Bow ties are cool - ask any time traveler or a doctor.

items.name: Gear Necklace
items.description: Every few years gears are in fashion again - it's just like clockwork.

items.name: Shark Tooth Necklace
items.description: Let everybody know just how tough you are with this shark tooth necklace.

items.name: Space Tie
items.description: For a look that's out of this world!

items.name: Purple Bow Tie
items.description: The last of the original three limited edition bow ties released in October 2009.

items.name: Rainbow Bow Tie
items.description: It matches everything. It also clashes with everything.

items.name: Black Cat Scarf
items.description: Is it really crossing your path if its across your shoulders?

items.name: Red Bow Tie
items.description: For those of you who didn't get the Green Bow Tie, we bring you a red one. Impress your friends and terrify your enemies with the new, limited edition Red Bow Tie.

items.name: Skull Tie
items.description: It is a black tie, but probably not appropriate for a black tie party.

items.name: Golden Four Leaf Clover Bow Tie
items.description: You've got luck and fabulous taste.

items.name: Zebra Tie
items.description: You're always ready for something wild to happen.

items.name: Scorpion Pendant
items.description: He's actually still alive.  I'd watch those pinchers if I were you.....

items.name: Origami Crane Necklace
items.description: If 1000 paper cranes make your wish come true, does 1 make your wish come true 1/1000 times?

items.name: Pencil Scarf
items.description: My favorite part of winter break? All the homework I got assigned!

items.name: Holly Jolly Bow Tie
items.description: It really is the best time of the year!  You'll look great at all of your fancy holiday parties in this awesome bow tie!

items.name: Moth Bow Tie
items.description: Perfect for a night on the town, but be prepared to lose your tie if you walk past a bright light.

items.name: Bacon Tie
items.description: Because sometimes you just need a tie made out of ham products.  I can't imagine when that time is, but I'm sure there is a time.

items.name: Nerdy Computer Necklace
items.description: Saying it in Klingon it only makes it worse...

items.name: Leaf Stylz Scarf
items.description: You've got leet leaf stylz.

items.name: Starlet Disguise
items.description: No one will have any idea who you are in this stylish Bloxmes scarf and sunglasses.... until they see your name above you in game.

items.name: Egg Tie 2011
items.description: It's an eggcellent tie!

items.name: Caterpillar Scarf
items.description: This very hungry caterpillar won't eat you... but he will make you look adorable!

items.name: United States Bow Tie
items.description: Appreciating the freedom to wear ridiculous ties since 1776.

items.name: Superstar Scarf
items.description: You're a star. Now everyone knows it.

items.name: Snow Bow Tie
items.description: Sophisticated, but freezing.

items.name: Futuregleam Necklace
items.description: The factions would do anything to possess the pendant, and the terrible power contained within.

items.name: Cute Chick Scarf
items.description: What could be nicer on a bright spring day!
